intent: Audit project + recommend top items in one combined list across refinement, depth, UX, gamification, AI/intelligence, security, performance/organization, and token-API consumption; then implement all items at the highest/optimal quality in one pass in optimal efficiency order. Also fix the broken Best-Moment GIF after death and brainstorm strategic objectives building on the founder-loved 'circle that increases score' concept.
intentOutcome: Achieved end-to-end. All 12 audited items shipped in one pass with full test coverage. The 'circle' concept generalized into a 5-type Dynamic Objective System (Hot Zones / Bounty / Sniper / Lockdown / Escort) weighted by player-weakness analysis.
shipped: Best-Moment GIF fix — decoupled buffer capture from encode (always capture on desktop, widen cadence under load instead of disabling); moved gifenc encoding off main thread via new src/workers/gifEncode.worker.js with 15s timeout; closes the S55 silent-empty-buffer bug

Studio OS skill-cost telemetry — scripts/log-skill-cost.mjs appends per-invocation {skill, model, tokens, ms} records to ignis/output/agent-spend.json (rolling last 200) and prints top-5 skills by spend
Daily Crown 👑 — getDailyChampion() in src/storage.js + 'TODAY'S CHAMPION' banner under HomeV2 hero + 👑 badge on row 0 of daily-challenge leaderboard tab

HUD Density preset (Minimal / Standard / Tactical) — hudDensity setting + hudFlags(density) exporter in src/settings.js; SettingsPanel exposes picker on Quick tab; HUD.jsx mission widget + ammo bars + heat chip all gated

Adaptive enemy telegraphing — recordDeathByEnemy + getTelegraphMultiplier in src/storage.js (rolling 20-death window); App.jsx precomputes gs._telegraphMult per run; Bullet Ring + Ground Slam warning windows widen 1.5x at 2 deaths, 2x at 3+ deaths to that enemy type
Heat Meter — src/systems/heatMeter.js (+test, 6 cases): gs.heat 0..100, +3/kill, +5/+8 streak, +20 boss, decays 0.20/frame; replaces combo-driven setMusicTier swap; HUD shows 🔥 HEAT chip top-right
AI Run Coach — src/utils/runCoach.js (+test, 3 cases) composes metaClarity + runDebrief + recent-deaths-by-enemy into 3-line death-screen verdict (Killed by / Try next / Working)

Replay Codes — src/utils/replayCode.js (+test, 4 cases) — 12 hex chars with mod-16 checksum encoding {seed, mode, difficulty, weaponIdx, starterLoadout}; HomeV2 deploy dropdown exposes paste-to-load + 📋 SHARE CODE buttons

scoreLedger + combatResolution scaffold — src/systems/scoreLedger.js (+test, 4 cases) owns computeKillPoints (used at both kill sites in App.jsx); src/systems/combatResolution.js ships pointInCircle + dist2 (used by Hot Zones); full bullet-vs-enemy resolver extraction deferred to S58

Dynamic Objective System — src/systems/objectiveDirector.js (+test, 8 cases): pickObjective + tickObjective; 5 types (hot_zone, bounty, sniper, lockdown, escort); 35% spawn rate on non-boss waves; weighted by metaClarity.identifyWeakness; rewards = bonus score / 💩 coins / +1 banked perk choice; rendered in drawGame.js between floor zones and entities

Doodie Pass Lite — src/utils/cosmeticTrack.js (+test, 4 cases): 10 cosmetics over 4 weeks anchored 2026-05-04; free track unlocks 4 via career milestones (runs/deaths/bestWave/totalKills); supporter unlocks all + early access; rendered in SupporterModal.jsx as 5×2 grid; cosmetic-only, never gameplay-impacting

validate-replay Edge Function — supabase/functions/validate-replay/index.ts heuristic plausibility validator (kills/wave ≤140, score/kill ≤ mode cap × diff mult, time/wave ≥4s, bestStreak ≤ kills, damage/kill in [5..200000]); writes anomalies to existing run_anomalies; deploy YAML wired
deferred: S58: extract bullet-vs-enemy resolver to combatResolution.js (full resolver, not just helpers) — required by validate-replay Phase 2 (deterministic resim from seed + input_hash)
S58: wire Heat Meter into drawGame.js for screen palette tint at heat ≥ 70 (currently only swaps music tier)
S58: per-objective achievement chains (3 hot zones in a row, 5 bounties, escort 100% HP, lockdown survived under 30s)
S56 carryover: founder-side Cloudflare zone-add + Namecheap NS swap + IP allowlist update

validation.tests: 303/303 passing across 39 test files (was 248 across 32 — added 55 new tests across 7 new modules)
validation.build: not run this session — additive features with full test coverage at unit level
